# Do Stuff & Have Fun

Do Stuff & Have Fun is a video site for the connected YouTube channels. The site shows the latest public uploads, channel links, individual video pages, embeds, descriptions, thumbnails, and video metadata.

Primary website: https://dostuffandhavefun.com/

Main pages:
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/
- https://dostuffandhavefun.com/videos/

Content focus:
- Latest uploads from the connected YouTube channels.
- Individual pages for each public video.
- Embedded YouTube videos with titles, descriptions, thumbnails, tags, and watch links.
- Channel lanes for the connected accounts.

Audience:
- Viewers looking for the creator's latest videos.
- Search engines and answer engines looking for accurate video metadata.
